label: base-character
prompt: A friendly 52-year-old Caucasian woman, a relatable everyday mom. Shoulder-length light-brown hair with subtle greys, warm blue-grey eyes, soft smile lines, fair skin with natural freckles and texture. Wearing a plain solid-colour casual sweater with no logos, no graphics, no prints. Warm, genuine, approachable expression. Extreme realism, detailed skin, realistic facial imperfections, natural daylight lighting, front-view close-up portrait looking directly at the camera, passport-style, only the close-up.
